question: Which formula will return the average of the non-empty cells in the range B2:B10, ignoring zeros?
What does the formula =OFFSET(A1,5,3,2,2) return?
options: A) The value in cell D7
B) A reference to a 2x2 range starting at F6
C) A reference to a 2x2 range starting at D6
D) The value in cell F8

question: Which function can be used to lookup a value in a table and return a value from a column to the left of the lookup column?
What is the result of the formula =SUMPRODUCT((A2:A5="Yes")*(B2:B5>10),C2:C5)?
options: A) The sum of C2:C5 where A is "Yes" and B > 10
B) The product of sums of A, B, and C
C) The count of rows where A is "Yes" and B > 10
D) #VALUE! error because of mismatched array sizes

question: How can you return the nth largest value in a range D1:D20 while ignoring duplicates?
Which formula will extract the text between the first and second commas in cell A1?
What does the formula =FILTER(A2:B20,B2:B20>100) do?
options: A) Returns all rows where column B > 100
B) Returns a single value from column A where column B > 100
C) Sorts the range A2:B20 by values > 100
D) Creates a pivot table of values > 100

question: Which function pair can be used to find the first empty cell in column C?
Which formula will combine the values in columns A and B into a single column separated by a dash, ignoring blank cells?
What does the array formula {=MAX(IF(A1:A10="X",B1:B10))} return?
options: A) The maximum value in B1:B10 where A1:A10 is "X"
B) The maximum value in A1:A10 where B1:B10 is "X"
C) The count of "X" in A1:A10
D) A #VALUE! error because IF returns a non-numeric array
